feature1Description: Next.js 16 App Router with nested layouts, server components, streaming, and static generation built in.
feature2Description: Beautiful, accessible component library with dark mode, responsive design, and customizable theming.
feature3Description: Full strict mode with Zod runtime validation, zero use of any, and comprehensive type safety.
feature4Description: Multi-language support with next-intl, locale-aware routing, and structured translation messages.
feature5Description: Seamless light and dark mode switching powered by next-themes with system preference detection.
feature6Description: Type-safe server actions with input validation, error handling, and authentication guards built in.
heading: Everything You Need
subheading: A carefully curated stack of modern tools and best practices, ready out of the box.
